name: Trailing Stop App
shortDesc: You're in a winning trade and don't know when to get out. Exit too early and you leave money on the table. Hold too long and you watch the gains evaporate. Every exit becomes a gut call you regret either way.

hero.title: Stop guessing when to exit.
paragraphs: Every trader knows the feeling. You're in a winning trade, but you don't know when to get out. Exit too early and you leave money on the table. Hold too long and you give it all back.

The Trailing Stop App connects directly to your Schwab brokerage account. It monitors your open positions, tracks the highest price since each order was entered, and shows you exactly how much profit is locked in, updated automatically, no charts required.

points.title: Locked profit, always visible
points.desc: For each position, the app tracks the highest high since your order entered and calculates your stop price and guaranteed profit in real time.

points.title: Bracket orders in one tap
points.desc: The trade screen places a limit buy and a trailing stop sell together as a single triggered order. Your exit is set the moment you enter.

points.title: Credentials never leave the server
points.desc: A Cloudflare Worker handles the Schwab OAuth exchange. Your API secrets stay server-side. The browser only ever holds short-lived access tokens.

demo.label: Screenshots
demo.title: See it in action
demo.subtitle: The trailing stop dashboard and the one-tap bracket order screen.

screenshots.alt: Trailing Stops portfolio screen showing AAPL, AMZN, GOOG and MSFT with market price, stop, floating P/L, and locked profit
screenshots.caption: Portfolio view. Each position shows its trail gap, market and stop prices, and the profit locked in above cost basis.

screenshots.alt: Trading screen for AAPL with quantity, limit price, trail stop gap, and a Place Order button
screenshots.caption: Trading screen. Set quantity, limit, and trail gap, then Place Order fires a limit BUY plus trailing stop SELL as a single bracket.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From login to locked-in profit
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from Schwab OAuth to a live trailing stop dashboard.

steps.title: Connect with Schwab OAuth
steps.desc: Click "Login with Schwab". The app fetches an auth URL from the Cloudflare Worker, redirects you to Schwab, and exchanges the returned code for an access token. The refresh token lasts 7 days. The app silently renews access tokens as they expire.

steps.title: Portfolio dashboard loads your positions
steps.desc: The app polls your Schwab account every 60 seconds for open positions and any trailing stop orders with status `AWAITING_STOP_CONDITION`. For each matched position it fetches price history (1-minute candles for new entries, up to daily candles for older ones) to find the highest high since entry.

steps.title: Stop price and locked profit update live
steps.desc: Each row shows your ticker and trail gap, the current market price and calculated stop (highestHigh minus trailGap), and both your floating P&L and the profit locked in above cost basis. Price history refreshes every 10 minutes. If the API is unreachable, the app falls back to demo data automatically.

tech.label: Under the hood
tech.title: How it was built
tech.subtitle: Flutter on the front, a Cloudflare Worker in the middle, and the Schwab API behind it all.

items: Flutter & Dart. Cross-platform (web, iOS, Android, desktop)
5-tab navigation: Portfolio, Trading, History, Ranking, Settings
Search, asset-type tabs, and per-position detail screens
Schwab REST API. Positions, orders, quotes, price history
Adaptive candle resolution (1m to 5m to 30m to daily based on position age)
Bracket orders. Limit BUY + trailing stop SELL as a single TRIGGER order
Schwab OAuth 2.0 via Cloudflare Worker proxy. Secrets never in the browser
In-memory token storage with silent refresh
Flutter Web on Vercel at trade.dataflexlab.com
